title: Isnardia lanceolata
taxonomy: Isnardia lanceolata is classified within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Isnardia and is native to the island of Réunion. Isnardia lanceolata is an endemic species of orchid, meaning it is found exclusively in the wild on this specific island. This species is a type of terrestrial orchid, which typically grows in the ground. Isnardia lanceolata is also known to be a relatively rare and endangered orchid due to habitat loss and degradation.
